name: TitleMax Title Loans
description_short: TitleMax offers same-day title loans and flex lines of credit secured by your vehicle title, accepting most credit types at multiple Memphis locations.
description_long:
TitleMax is one of the largest title lending chains in the US, with this Summer Avenue Memphis location open since February 2007. The store serves residents across the greater Memphis area and has built a substantial local reputation, accumulating over 481 Google reviews with a 5.00/5 average rating. The company operates multiple locations within a few miles of each other in Memphis, making access convenient for local borrowers.

The Summer Avenue store offers two main product lines. The first is a title pledge and flex line of credit — a secured loan where borrowers use their clear vehicle title as collateral, allowing them to qualify regardless of credit score. The second is an unsecured flexible line of credit available both in-store and online, which does not require a vehicle. Both products are structured as revolving lines of credit, meaning borrowers can withdraw funds as needed up to their credit limit rather than receiving a single lump sum. Online personal loans are available to residents of AZ, DE, ID, KS, MO, MS, SC, TN, TX, UT, and WI only.

What distinguishes this location is its bilingual capability, extended weekday hours (until 7pm on Mondays and Fridays), and the combination of secured and unsecured lending options under one roof. The store emphasizes quick approval and same-day cash disbursement. Borrowers who use title pledges keep possession of their vehicle throughout the repayment period. The flex structure gives borrowers more control over how much they draw and when, which can reduce total interest compared to a fixed lump-sum title loan.

Honestly, TitleMax serves a specific niche: people who need fast cash, have a paid-off vehicle, and cannot qualify for conventional credit. The website does not disclose APRs or fee structures, which is a significant transparency gap — title loans in Tennessee typically carry triple-digit annualized rates. Borrowers should fully understand repayment terms before signing, as default can result in vehicle repossession. This is a product of last resort, appropriate when no lower-cost options are available, not a routine credit tool.
pros: Same-day cash disbursement available — no waiting period after approval
Accepts most credit types; vehicle title value matters more than credit score for title pledges
Borrowers keep driving their vehicle while repaying the loan
Bilingual staff available at this location
481+ Google reviews averaging 5.00/5 stars — strong local customer satisfaction record
Flex line of credit structure lets borrowers draw funds incrementally, not all at once
Both secured (title) and unsecured (personal line of credit) products offered at same location
cons: APR and fee structure not disclosed on the website — title loans in Tennessee typically carry very high annualized rates
Title pledge requires a clear vehicle title with no existing lien — excludes borrowers still financing their car
Default risk is vehicle repossession — collateral is your car
Online unsecured loans restricted to 10 states only; Tennessee in-store required for other borrowers
Closed Sundays; limited Saturday hours (closes at 4pm)
best_for: Memphis residents with a paid-off vehicle who need same-day emergency cash
Borrowers with poor or damaged credit who cannot qualify for traditional personal loans
People who need a revolving credit line rather than a fixed lump-sum loan
Spanish-speaking borrowers needing bilingual financial services in Memphis
diagnosis: TitleMax is best for Memphis borrowers with a clear vehicle title who need same-day cash and have been turned down elsewhere due to poor credit. The main caveat is cost transparency: APRs are not published, title loans in Tennessee routinely exceed 100% APR, and defaulting means losing your vehicle — borrow only what you can repay quickly.
services: Title pledge loans (secured by vehicle title)
Flex line of credit (secured revolving credit against vehicle title)
Credit check with most credit types accepted
Vehicle value assessment for loan sizing
